title: WW1 Minecraft Project
body:
THIS MOD IS NO LONGER IN DEVELOPMENT, THE ACTIVE VERSION OF THE MOD IS LOCATED HERE: https://modrinth.com/mod/fields-of-1918




This is my World War I mod. There are some weapons in the fashion, and uniforms of soldiers from the period 1893-1918. The mod includes a Lebel rifle, an MG 14/17 machine gun and a Gewehr 88 rifle.The mod is not completely ready, there will be updates in the future. Also in fashion there is a decoration in the form of a cannon. Features: Lots of uniforms, pixelated weapons in Minecraft style, simple weapon mechanics. The mod was made using McCreator, and the weapon models were made using Blockbench. Version 1.18-1.18.2. My YouTube channel: [https://youtube.com/@alexdnet?si=2V1uRIeTlRpYrhkL] Video review of the mod: https://youtu.be/9wBSC3vM8ns?si=b6klDGC09ASB9wr-
